Form S-3 Registration Statement

Under the Securities Act of 1933

Calculation of Registration Fee

Title of Each Class of Securities to be Registered: Common Stock, par value of one cent per share

Proposed Maximum Aggregate Offering Price: $250,000,000

Use of Proceeds

We intend to use the net proceeds from the sale of any securities offered by this prospectus for general corporate purposes, including working capital, capital expenditures, and potential acquisitions. We may also use a portion of the proceeds to repay outstanding indebtedness. Pending such uses, we intend to invest the net proceeds in short-term, investment-grade securities.
